description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a low-pitched hip roof and clean, angular lines. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely stucco or painted concrete, with large windows providing ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with shrubs and a few small trees, giving it a private yet open feel. A driveway leads to a covered carport on one side, while the opposite side features a small patio or outdoor seating area. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more rectangular. The main entryway is recessed, featuring a simple door with a small overhang and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a hip roof, smooth light exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped surroundings. Features include a carport, patio, and a recessed main entryway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long facade, large windows, and landscaped garden area.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, driveway, carport, and front landscaping.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible patio area, more windows, and additional garden space.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying more windows and the continuation of the landscaped perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple door, small overhang, and minimal decorative elements
